originalTitle: Circle clashed with Tether-backed fund over market manipulation concerns
summary: New filings detail long-running legal battle between Heka Funds and the $73bn stablecoin group
content: New filings detail long-running legal battle between Heka Funds and the $73bn stablecoin group
chineseTitle: Circle 与 Tether 支持的基金因市场操纵担忧发生冲突
chineseSummary: 新文件详细介绍了 Heka Funds 与价值 730 亿美元的稳定币集团之间长期的法律斗争
chineseContent: 新文件详细介绍了 Heka Funds 与价值 730 亿美元的稳定币集团之间长期的法律斗争
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
